methods.name: Recent Tail Raw
methods.description: Toma los ultimos N tokens del raw prose (cola reciente). Sin comprension de contenido.

methods.name: Head + Tail Raw
methods.description: Toma cabecera + cola del raw prose con proporcion 25/75.

methods.name: Head JSON
methods.description: Toma los primeros N tokens del JSON.

methods.name: Head Markdown Summary
methods.description: Toma los primeros N tokens del markdown estructurado.

methods.name: Semantic Field Pack
methods.description: Selecciona entradas por perfil semantico general: identity, constraints, focus, objective.

methods.name: Keyword Retrieval Raw
methods.description: BM25-like: rankea parrafos de raw prose por coincidencia con la pregunta + gold terms.

methods.name: CORTEX PP v1 (CLI v1.x render)
methods.description: Seleccion por prioridad cognitiva P0->P5 usando CLI v1.x render --profile.

methods.name: CORTEX v2 PP (CLI v0.3.2 convert (canonical))
methods.description: v2.0.0: usa v2-convert --from cortex --to hcortex con perfiles y VIEW directives.

methods.name: CORTEX v2 Canonical (normalize + render)
methods.description: v2.0.0: canonicalize --preserve seguido de v2-convert. Produces normalized HCORTEX.

methods.name: Ablation: no P0 priority
methods.description: Elimina prioridad P0 (FCS, OBJ, CNST, STP tratados como P5). Mide contribucion de P0.

methods.name: Ablation: no temporal
methods.description: Elimina distincion current/planned/future. Mide contribucion del scope temporal.
